differential_diagnoses: Pyroglutamic acidosis (5-oxoproline) due to chronic acetaminophen and nutritional depletion
Euglycemic diabetic ketoacidosis secondary to SGLT2 inhibitor (dapagliflozin)
next_steps: Perform urgent arterial blood gas (ABG) analysis with lactate, electrolytes, and anion gap calculation
Measure serum beta-hydroxybutyrate and serum ammonia levels
Obtain non-contrast head CT to rule out intracranial hemorrhage or acute structural pathology
Obtain urinalysis with microscopy for crystals (e.g., calcium oxalate) and ketones
Perform blood and urine cultures and initiate broad-spectrum antibiotics for urosepsis
Monitor renal function closely and manage fluid resuscitation in the setting of right ventricular dysfunction
